title: Struthanthus haenkeanus
taxonomy: Struthanthus haenkeanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. It is commonly known as a mistletoe or hemiparasite, and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Loranthaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are typically parasitic or hemiparasitic, and are found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Struthanthus haenkeanus is classified within the genus Struthanthus, which is a group of plants that are native to the Americas. This species is often associated with its unique and complex relationship with its host plants.
